mapper.select: select no from group_morak where group_no = #{groupNo}
select group_title from group_morak where group_no = #{groupNo}
select nickname from member where no = #{no}

SELECT mg.no, gm.group_title AS groupName, gm.start_date AS startDate, gm.last_date AS endDate, mg.status AS statues, gm.price AS amount FROM member_group mg JOIN group_morak gm ON mg.group_no = gm.group_no WHERE mg.no = #{no} AND mg.status = '찜' ORDER BY gm.start_date

SELECT mg.no, gm.group_title AS groupName, gm.start_date AS startDate, gm.last_date AS endDate, mg.status AS status, gm.price AS amount FROM member_group mg JOIN group_morak gm ON mg.group_no = gm.group_no WHERE mg.no = #{no} AND CURRENT_DATE BETWEEN gm.start_date AND gm.last_date ORDER BY gm.start_date

SELECT mg.no, gm.group_title AS groupName, gm.start_date AS startDate, gm.last_date AS endDate, mg.status AS status, gm.price AS amount FROM member_group mg JOIN group_morak gm ON mg.group_no = gm.group_no WHERE mg.no = #{no} AND CURRENT_DATE > gm.last_date ORDER BY gm.start_date
SELECT no,content,is_read,reg_date from notification where no = #{no}

SELECT gm.group_title, gm.start_date, gm.last_date, gm.price, mg.status FROM member_group mg JOIN group_morak gm ON mg.group_no = gm.group_no WHERE mg.status != 'LEADER' and mg.no = #{no} and gm.last_date > current_date

SELECT gm.group_title, gm.start_date, gm.last_date, gm.price, mg.status FROM member_group mg JOIN group_morak gm ON mg.group_no = gm.group_no WHERE (mg.status = 'LEADER' OR mg.status = 'MEMBER') AND mg.no = #{no} AND current_date > gm.last_date
SELECT group_title,start_date,last_date,price,approval as status from group_morak where no = #{no} and last_date > current_date
